sections.content: Let me check the current player position and see if we're now adjacent to or overlapping with the bottom blue square or the horizontal bar.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current player position and nearby objects
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    center = (sum(rows)/len(rows), sum(cols)/len(cols))
    if n['id'] in [4, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10]:  # bar, bottom blue square, player
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, center={center}, boundary={b}")

# Check adjacency
print(f"\nAdjacency: {current_frame.segmentation['adjacency_list']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
